texto: The secret is in absolutely refusing to let the river beat you down. If I had to, I'd measure my progress in inches. One more inch I've swum—one less inch to swim. Once you know the secret, then nobody's river can bring you down.
explicacao: Citação de Bette Greene sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The secret is in absolutely refusing to let the river beat you down. If I had to, I'd measure my …” articula reflexao, inner-strength, secret em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
